channel.title: Smart Home Circle
channel.description: A comprehensive resource covering Smart Home Tech, detailed Single Board Computers (SBC) reviews, mini PC, Home Automation, HomeLab upgrades, and Home Assistant guides.

item.title: How to Run Frigate NVR on Radxa Rock 5T Using the Built-In NPU
item.description: Learn how to run Frigate NVR on the Radxa Rock 5T. Leverage the built-in RK3588 NPU for low-power, subscription-free local AI object detection with multiple IP video streams and see how it performs
item.author: contactsmarthomecircle@gmail.com (Amrut Prabhu)

item.title: Radxa Rock 5T: Pi-Sized Power With PCIe, NVMe, USB 3.1 Gen2, Thermals & Real-World Benchmarks
item.description: Discover real-world benchmarks, dual NVMe testing, and blazing-fast Home Assistant AI performance that easily outshines the Raspberry Pi 5
item.author: contactsmarthomecircle@gmail.com (Amrut Prabhu)

item.title: Building the Ultimate DIY NAS: ZimaBoard 2 Review & Benchmarks
item.description: Build the ultimate compact DIY NAS with ZimaBoard 2. Leveraging ZimaOS and dual 2.5GbE, this energy-efficient kit simplifies backups, media streaming, and running virtual machines for your personal home lab
item.author: contactsmarthomecircle@gmail.com (Amrut Prabhu)

item.title: Radxa Orion O6N: My experience with this Nano-ITX Arm powerhouse
item.description: Powerful Radxa Orion O6N Nano-ITX review: benchmarks, Linux support, thermals, AI tests, and I/O performance with UEFI support.
item.author: contactsmarthomecircle@gmail.com (Amrut Prabhu)

item.title: Radxa Cubie A7Z: Raspberry Pi Zero–sized Powerful SBC
item.description: Radxa Cubie A7Z review with benchmarks, NVMe over PCIe Gen3 x1, USB 3.1 Gen2 speeds, thermals, power draw, and real-world 1080p/4K playback tests.
item.author: contactsmarthomecircle@gmail.com (Amrut Prabhu)

item.title: Radxa Dragon Q6A: my hands-on experience (benchmarks, thermals, and Windows 11 Pro on ARM)
item.description: My Radxa Dragon Q6A review with benchmark results, thermals, NVMe/UFS speeds, Home Assistant voice tests, and a walkthrough of Windows 11 on ARM (UEFI).
item.author: contactsmarthomecircle@gmail.com (Amrut Prabhu)

item.title: Muse Pi Pro (Spacemit K1 / M1) – My First Real RISC-V Experience
item.description: Hands-on review of the Muse Pi Pro RISC-V SBC with the SpacemiT K1 SoC – benchmarks, thermals, NVMe and Wi-Fi 6 performance, plus my honest thoughts for developers.
item.author: contactsmarthomecircle@gmail.com (Amrut Prabhu)

item.title: Radxa Cubie A7A Review: Pi-Sized Power With PCIe, NVMe, USB 3.1 Gen2, Thermals & Real-World Benchmarks
item.description: I benchmarked the Radxa Cubie A7A (Allwinner A733): thermals, Geekbench, LPDDR5, PCIe NVMe, USB 3.1 Gen2, Whisper/HA, and Pi 5 vs Pi 4 comparisons.
item.author: contactsmarthomecircle@gmail.com (Amrut Prabhu)
